privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated users and hardware assets injected directly via the Snipe-IT API in setup scripts. The specific compromised assets (LPT-MKT-04, LPT-SALES-11, LPT-HR-02) and control assets (LPT-EXEC-01, LPT-DEV-09) correctly match the task definition. The expected new status label 'Quarantined - Forensic Hold' must strictly have an undeployable configuration (deployable=0, pending=0, archived=0 in the database). The verifier logic matches 'CS-8841' in the asset notes, confirming the metadata claims.
